props.ChoiceText: You tracked because hunger demanded it, and survival became the only quarry that mattered.
props.ChoiceBio: A winter starvation trail taught you that in the deep cold, survival itself becomes the hunt.

0.TransitionText: Because a winter starvation trail taught you that in the deep cold, survival itself becomes the hunt, the wild stopped feeding you and left only hardship behind.

1.TransitionText: Because a winter starvation trail taught you that in the deep cold, survival itself becomes the hunt, you kept to the wild and made solitude, sign, and patience your trade.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Hunter, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a winter starvation trail taught you that survival itself becomes the hunt, the wild taught you omens and feared remedies.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.
